programme.title: History Detectives: Lauste Film Clip, Baker's Gold, Transatlantic Cable
programme.desc: A collector believes he has a clip from the first ever talking picture. Wes Cowan explores Gold Rush territory. A Cape Cod beachcomber finds what he believes is a section of the first transatlantic cable.

programme.title: Africa's Great Civilizations: Commerce and the Clash of Civilizations
programme.desc: Gates explores the dynamism of 19th century Africa, the 'Scramble' by European powers for its riches, and the defiant and successful stand of uncolonized Ethiopia.

programme.title: Genius by Stephen Hawking: What Are We?
programme.desc: Scientist Stephen Hawking challenges three ordinary people to find out what we really are. Self-assembling machines, light-up bacteria and the world’s first physical demonstration of evolution in action conspire to revolutionize their view of life.

programme.title: Nova: Bigger Than T.Rex
programme.desc: Almost a century ago, paleontologists found fossil bones from a dinosaur that was bigger than Tyrannosaurus rex. New bones in Morocco have reopened the investigation into this epic beast. Paleontologists reconstruct the carnivore.

programme.title: The Great American Read: Other Worlds

programme.title: American Masters: Ursula K. Le Guin
programme.desc: Explore the remarkable life and legacy of late feminist author Ursula K. Le Guin whose groundbreaking work, including 'The Left Hand of Darkness,' transformed American literature by bringing science fiction into the literary mainstream.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Little Women

programme.title: The Roosevelts: An Intimate History: Get Action (1858-1901)
programme.desc: A frail, asthmatic young Theodore Roosevelt transforms himself into a vigorous champion of the strenuous life, loses one great love and finds another, leads men into battle and then rises like a rocket to become the youngest president in American history.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Svengali

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Liberties

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Bedtime

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Manhattan Vigil

programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Naked and Afraid of Sharks Pt. 1
programme.desc: Five all-star survivalists are stranded on a barren island in the middle of the most shark-infested waters on Earth for 14 days with no food, water or clothes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Naked and Afraid of Sharks Pt. 2
programme.desc: All-star survivalists must overcome challenges, like deadly insects and brutal storms, and put their skills to the test to survive exclusively on what the ocean provides.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Biting Back At Africa
programme.desc: In a unique four-person challenge, a lion attack survivor returns to Africa to face her fears. Surrounded by lions, crocodiles and cape buffalo, the tribe of four struggles against constant threats and each other as they try to survive in a kill zone.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Trying to Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: A Canadian mountain man teams up with an experienced homesteader to take on Devil's Canyon, deep in Mexico's Baja desert. The intense heat, scarce water and venomous predators threaten their survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Punishment in Panama
programme.desc: Clint Jivoin and Laura Zerra are Naked and Afraid on a Panamanian island for 21 days. Plagued by sand flies and threatened by snakes and crocodiles the pair have to stick together using all their skills and experience to survive in the tropical hell.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Biting Back At Africa
programme.desc: In a unique four-person challenge, a lion attack survivor returns to Africa to face her fears. Surrounded by lions, crocodiles and cape buffalo, the tribe of four struggles against constant threats and each other as they try to survive in a kill zone.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a Special Forces veteran risk hypothermia at every turn as they take on Canada with no clothes. Bitter cold, torrential rain and wandering bears and moose make every night a struggle, and an obstinate chipmunk pushes their patience.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Primal Fear
programme.desc: Mountain man Luke and a homeschooling mom and triathlete named Lindsey are dropped into the dry and thorny landscape of Africa's Namibia, surrounded by some of the deadliest apex predators on the continent.

programme.title: Inside the FBI
programme.desc: Agents from the San Diego FBI office share details of ongoing cases including a Mexican Mafia takedown and a drug cartel mass murder.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: NHRA and a '55 Pink Caddy, Part II
programme.desc: After a constant wait for parts for the '55 Pink Caddy, the monkeys make a mad dash to get the car done on time. Meanwhile, Richard ventures into new territory as his Gas Monkey Dragster hits the Texas Motorplex for the NHRA qualifying runs.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Back to the '80s in a '68 Coronet
programme.desc: Richard buys a '69 Malibu only to realize there are massive issues. Aaron crashes into a '68 Coronet on the GMG lot. Richard travels to St. Louis to buy a tricked out '79 Camaro. Motley Crue performs at Gas Monkey Live grand opening.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Rocking '76 G10 Van
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron take on a different build when they to transform a $300 find on the side of the road into a '76 Exploration van. The Dale Earnhardt '56 Nomad makes an appearance back at the shop, as KC and his team are tasked with fixing the body.

programme.title: Driven: Shelby's Secret Project
programme.desc: Beau Boeckmann and the Galpin Crew resurrect a one-of-a-kind Pantera that Carroll Shelby hot-rodded for a secret project with Lee Iacocca. Meanwhile, a celebrity client arrives to pick up his restored '68 Charger with modern muscle under the hood.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Tuxedo Rod
programme.desc: Steve trades in his trademark rust for a shiny paintjob when he tackles a 1965 Lincoln Continental for a flashy bartender from L.A. The problem is parts for this boat are impossible to find.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Pickup Rod

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Fruit Rod
programme.desc: When a California fruit farmer with a taste for hot rods asks Steve for a 1954 GMC COE truck he decides to take it over the top; with a 1200-horsepower engine mounted behind the cab, the crew begin their love affair with the baddest truck ever made.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Bitchin' Rod
programme.desc: Steve's younger brother Dusty has flown in from Montana. He's always wanted his own rat rod and brings Steve a limited budget and a dream. The only problem is Steve gets a little carried away and sinks a major chunk of his own change into it.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Wagon Rod
programme.desc: The Welderup crew transforms a '57 Chevy Wagon from a grocery grabber into one nasty ride.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Ditch Digger

programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No Sugar, Tons of Spice
programme.desc: Two teams duke it out against the catastrophic concoctions from Chef Willie.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Fighting Back the Tears
programme.desc: Gym-loving ladies power through the pain while bartending besties try to knock back the heat. The fight for $25,000 is not easy. Friendships will strain, people will cry, and stomachs will be destroyed in the pepperdome.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: TKOMG
programme.desc: Cocky sisters challenge best bros in the Pepperdome. However, the sauce proves too hot to handle for one team, resulting in the first TKO.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Good, the Bad and the Punished
programme.desc: The guys pose as cranky NY cab drivers, then solicit undeserved congrats in the park. Then, tonight's loser is sheriff of an old Nevada town.

programme.title: Botched: The Bacon Bra

programme.title: Botched: Mo' Steroids Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Terry helps Mo Thugs rapper Guillermo 'Big Caz' Eiland and his case of 'Man Boobs,' former Model Jana Stoner who got breast implants in her butt after a Mexico surgery gone bad and a UK man with super-sized lips sees the doctors about his leaking filler.

programme.title: Botched: The Pec Whisperer
programme.desc: 'The Human Doll,' Justin Jedlica, returns to help Dr. Dubrow pump up a 'pec-less' body builder. Also, a former Miss India hopes Dr. Nassif can perfect her pig nose and the Doctors have a heart-to-heart with a woman obsessed with body modification.

programme.title: Botched: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The doctors help a woman whose nose was botched by the 'House of Horrors.' Also, Tanya hopes to remove a scar that reminds her of her unborn twin and the infamous Sarah Burge visits the doctors to find eternal youth.

programme.title: Botched: Say Yes to the Breasts
programme.desc: Former actress Heather fought a flesh-eating disease that left her with no breasts. Dr. Dubrow helps a spiritual woman who has a butt on her belly and Dr. Nassif helps a man whose doctor left a thumbprint on his nose.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Double Down on Ds!
programme.desc: The doctors take a gamble in Sin City, helping a young woman whose autoimmune disease may have triggered her deformed breasts.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: This Little Piggy Went to Surgery
programme.desc: The doctors travel to Texas to meet a female war veteran that was struck by lightning leaving her breasts and body disfigured. Then, they head to South Carolina to consult with a woman who has a misplaced toe on each foot.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Double Trouble and a Chest Bubble
programme.desc: The Doctors travel to Iowa to see a young father whose infected chest implant is threatening his life. Later, they meet a pair of twins with matching cleft deformities who want to look more identical.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Crooked and Cracked
programme.desc: Paul and Terry take their surgical expertise to patients who have been botched by nature.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: The Chronicles of Hernia
programme.desc: Travel to Virginia to meet a young woman with severely deformed breasts. Later, a doctor becomes patient when a serious medical condition arises.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Boobs and Tubes
programme.desc: The doctors set out for Vegas to meet a young mother born with Pectus excavatum, and whose underlying breast issues are getting harder to deal with. In Chicago, they consult with a woman born pre-maturely with nasal complications as an adult.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Collapsed In and Busted Out
programme.desc: Doctors Dubrow and Nassif head to Arizona to help a woman whose nose collapsed into her own face. In NYC, they meet a college student with an extremely oversized breast, and later ride through Central Park checking up on the HBIC, Tiffany Pollard.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Lip Service
programme.desc: The doctors visit a young mother in Detroit suffering from Tubular Breast Deformation. Later, they consult with a woman in Atlanta whose tumor has left overgrown tissue in her mouth. Before leaving the ATL, they visit past patient Dwight Eubanks.

programme.title: Botched: Shake What Your Momma Didn't Give You
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a woman who has gone to desperate measures to fix her breasts while Dr. Nassif takes on a patient whose surgeon poked a hole through her nose.

programme.title: Botched: Boob Trains and Big Butts
programme.desc: Paul and Terry help former music video vixen Tawny Kitaen get off the boob train. Later a heart shaped nose that gives love a bad name is treated and meet a Brazilian doll that wants a bigger butt.

programme.title: Botched: Meet the Future Mrs. Paul Nassif
programme.desc: A love-crazy Canadian uses her boobs to get to Paul and later, former model has nose fixed before her wedding.

programme.title: Botched: It's Called Bimbofication
programme.desc: Terry and Paul get schooled on bimbofication and later, a twin undergoes nose surgery to look like his brother again.

programme.title: Botched: Sticky Nipples and Paparazzi Nightmares
programme.desc: A mother of two has to duct tape up her breasts, and later, a young nurse has nose raved by nasal file. A D-list celebrity would like to get an A-list nose.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pizza Pro Playoffs
programme.desc: Four professional pizza makers rise to the occasion in three pizza-themed Grocery Games that determine who gets to take home all the dough. Guy Fieri challenges the chefs to shop for the ingredients in their signature pizza using only a mini pizza box.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: High-Roller Games
programme.desc: Money is no object for the four competing chefs as Guy Fieri declares it's High-Roller Night in Flavortown. First, Guy turns the GGG classic budget battle on its head by demanding the chefs spend over $60 when making their signature high-end dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Scratch Chef Showdown
programme.desc: In a world of convenience food, four scratch chefs show Guy Fieri what happens when convenience goes out the window. They have to make each component in their dishes entirely from scratch, like bread for their soup-and-sandwich combo.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG International All Stars

programme.desc: Style expert Carson Kressley teams up with Chef Anne Burrell to point out Bobby Flay's fashion and food faux pas. Two Italian authorities, chefs Kevin Sweeney and Nicco Muratore, are ready to prove that their food is trendsetting.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Take Him to Fresno

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sky High Spa

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Browntown Closedown?

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Earth: The Secret History

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Mercury: The Cursed Planet
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores Mercury, a deadly and tiny planet that faces constant attacks from the Sun, and which might one day pose a threat to all life on Earth.

programme.title: The Planets: Saturn: Mysteries Among the Rings
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino reveals the mysterious secrets of Saturn and its rings. Using the latest science from the Cassini mission, he explores the planet's giant icy geysers, powerful hurricanes, and the moon that may be hiding extraterrestrial life.

programme.desc: A retired couple is viciously stabbed to death in their Virginia home, and police work diligently to investigate every lead possible. Soon they find themselves questioning the couple's daughter and her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Lone Star Lust
programme.desc: A woman enters into an affair with her daughter's grandfather, causing a major rift in the family and eventually leading to a bloody Texas showdown.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sergeant and the Schoolgirl
programme.desc: When high school senior Michelle Miller joins the Future Soldiers program, she sees it as the first step to realizing her dream of enlisting in the Army. But a forbidden affair with her recruiter risks her career in the Army, and her future itself.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love or Family
programme.desc: A high school romance must be kept a secret from a domineering father with traditional values. When the truth comes out, a heartbreaking choice between love and family brings devastating consequences.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Behind Bars
programme.desc: An inmate in a West Virginia jail finds love in a hopeless place with a guard, but their love comes at a tragic cost.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Book of James
programme.desc: An affair between a married pastor and a member of his flock takes a shocking turn when he proposes a polygamous relationship with his wife. But an unexpected arrival threatens their pledge of secrecy.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Officer, Not a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Filipino woman falls for a married US Navy Officer who will do anything to keep his mistress and his money.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sum of Love
programme.desc: A friendship between a math teacher and assistant principal turns into a connection far deeper. But when a possessive estranged husband threatens their relationship and their safety, the pair take drastic measures to protect themselves against him.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Fruit of the Family Tree
programme.desc: A woman searching for acceptance from her family unexpectedly finds passionate love with her uncle. When their families turn on them in the face of taboo, they flee to start a new life in paradise.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The 22-Year Itch
programme.desc: In January 2003, Curt and Donna Thorngren's 22-year marriage, destroyed by debt, deceit, and drug addiction, ended in murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love Sick
programme.desc: In 2014, police are called to a lifeless body in a trailer in Winona, Missouri. The owners, Jason and Stephanie McClurg, have suffered a series of misfortunes which have put their marriage under enormous pressure. But nobody expected it to lead to murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love, Sex, and Trucking
programme.desc: Frances and Bill Hall Jr. appear to be the perfect couple two kids, a successful business, and a 30-year marriage. But on October 13, 2013, an unexpected encounter leads to a fatality, and the investigation reveals a story of infidelity and obsession.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, but discover what the reality was.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, but discover what the reality was.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Blue Ridge Mountain Home
programme.desc: Mark and the guys build a massive, and very complicated, log home high in the Blue Ridge Mountains. To make this unique design work, they create an entirely new kind of notch. They work with a local team of craftsmen to pull off this high-stakes build.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Apprentices
programme.desc: In Leicester, North Carolina, three young interns working alongside the Barnwood Builders save an extremely remote cabin in the hills. Back on the Boneyard in West Virginia, the young men are put to the test during the restoration.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: American Muscle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders create a timber frame barn for a private collection of American muscle cars in Columbus, Texas. Mark visits one of the biggest barns he's ever seen, finds the oldest live oak tree in the state and explores some local history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Bonanza
programme.desc: The builders score a major salvage from a barn near one of America's oldest pine forests in Brookville, Pennsylvania. Later, Mark and Sherman visit a local mill that turns reclaimed wood into spectacular products.

programme.title: Yardcore: Pacific Island Paradise
programme.desc: The Moss brothers take inspiration from the homeowners Pacific Island heritage and completely transform this backyard. A redwood deck overlooks a traditional Hapa shade structure and drought tolerant native landscaping finishes the yard.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: New Project, New Headache
programme.desc: When a hundred-year-old Victorian home that Nicole wants to renovate sells to other buyers, she convinces them to let her be involved as they work to get it back on the market.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Redux
programme.desc: With the exterior of the Harriet Project completely restored, Nicole and the guys move inside and begin demolition to prepare for pluming and electrical work.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Conundrums
programme.desc: Nicole searches for a set of salvaged cabinets to use in the Harriet Project's upper unit kitchen. With her own house still up for sale, Nicole visits the historical society to see if she can discover any new information about the property.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Revamp
programme.desc: Nicole repairs the hardwood floors in both living rooms of the Harriet Project and searches for replica tile to begin restoring a fireplace in the downstairs unit.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Finished Project
programme.desc: With only a few weeks left to finish the Harriet Project, Nicole and the homeowners divide and conquer to complete the lower unit's living room and kitchen. Nicole visits a local high school shop class to work on a radiator cover for the living room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Hardwood Floors to the Rescue
programme.desc: LeBron James and Nicole renovate the home of a family in need. They transform two bedrooms into three, to give each child their own room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bathroom Fit for King James
programme.desc: Downstairs is done at the Akron, Ohio house Nicole is rehabbing with LeBron and his foundation and now attention turns to the bathroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Looks Are Everything
programme.desc: The interior is coming along beautifully and now it's time to give the exterior of the family house in Akron a facelift. LeBron and his kids spar off with Nicole in a duel of diggers to tear out the front steps and regrade the yard.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Room of Their Own
programme.desc: Nicole, LeBron and the LeBron James Family Foundation continue with their project to renovate a needy family's home into a renovated beauty.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mom's Oasis
programme.desc: Hard working mom, Nicole Curtis is on a mission to create a master bedroom for mom Melanie in the final episode of the LeBron James Family Foundation house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Family Affair
programme.desc: It's a family affair as Nicole tackles an old shack that desperately needs some loving restoration. With the help of her brother, her nephew and her son, Ethan, carpets come up, there's new paint and a new fence.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1729 Kitchen and Living Room Addition
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin heads to a 1729 home to look at the kitchen and living room additions. He brings in reclaimed barn beams to create a threshold in between the rooms, adds a unique blend of rustic cabinetry and makes a coffee table out of a surprise piece.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Classic Colonial Parlor
programme.desc: An 1800s Center Colonial farmhouse addition to a 1760 stone home is turned into a classic parlor with a bar area and a billiards room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1684 Basement Gut Job
programme.desc: Jeff heads to Aston, PA, to restore the basement of one of the oldest houses in the area. The owners want to use the space for entertaining, so Jeff creates two bar areas, a sitting area, and restores an adjacent space to make a mudroom and entryway.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Guest House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff restores a kitchen and living room in a 1760 farmhouse for Tracey and Scott, who now use it as a guest house. The house was the original structure on their farm, which now contains a newer main house and several outbuildings.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s Master Bedroom and Library
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin restores a master bedroom and library in an amazing stone home in Bucks County, PA. The original home dates back to 1700 but the two rooms sit in additions that came later and lack some of the historic character.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1785 Three-Room Makeover
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on his latest project, a 1785 stone farmhouse owned by the Vitale family in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. Jeff's first task is to give a facelift to the 230-year-old fireplace. He then moves on to the kitchen and mudroom.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1717 Farmhouse Kitchen
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on a kitchen and living area in a rundown 1717 farmhouse. The original hardwood floors are a mess, the foyer and living room are drab and the kitchen addition doesn't match the character of the original house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Rundown 1710 Root Cellar
programme.desc: Angie and Tom recruit Jeff and his team to turn their crumbling 1710 root cellar into a welcoming wine cellar.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Some Like It Popped
programme.desc: Noah hits the Big Butler Fair in Prospect, PA., where he tears into the Conevore, filled to the brim with smoked brisket, pork and chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: When Harry Met Salad
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is the Wayne County Fair in Richmond, Ind., where he takes a stroll with the Walking BBQ, feels the groove of the King with a bacon PB&J quesadilla, goes healthy-ish with a deep fried salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ice Cream Dreams
programme.desc: Noah samples ice cream sensations from sweet to savory. Whether it's piled on top of delicious homemade donuts, or snuggling in-between bacon wafers, these ice cream dream dishes will have you begging for more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fusion Fiesta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lifts the lid on the American melting pot to reveal some decadent, delicious results. When fair goers meet fusion foods, the results can only be world domination.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Doggin'
programme.desc: Noah visits Maryland for a crab dip smothered dog; California for a cheesy, spicy Chile Relleno dog and a dessert dog covered in whipped cream and chocolate.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Better With Bacon
programme.desc: Everything's better with bacon and Noah Cappe is here to prove it. Noah travels to festival and fairs across the country, Noah finds the biggest, baddest and best bacon dishes around.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oaxaca
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores regional specialties in Oaxaca, Mexico. From complex mole negro sauce over Mayan-era tamales and crispy tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavors each bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: San Diego
programme.desc: From wild vegetables to wild animals, Andrew gets a taste of the unexpected when he visits San Diego.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Austin
programme.desc: The food in Austin can get a little weird but that's a compliment in a city where funky is part of the pioneer spirit.

programme.desc: Tia's best girls enjoy a healthy and flavorful Sunday-funday brunch after practicing some tips to stay fit. Including: fresh fruit smoothie, banana pancakes with blistered berries, flavorful quinoa breakfast bowl with shitakes, and crispy kale chips.

programme.desc: Michael Symon's in Nashville, where a killer new burger joint encourages you to construct your own custom creations. Then, he hits the heart of Cleveland where a newcomer pushes the boundaries of pub food and house-made brews.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Race for the Rigatoni Ribbon!/ Roaming Around Rome
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang compete against cheating Piston Pietro in Rome. The Happy Helpers cover for a sick friend by giving a tour of Rome to a travel critic.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Guru Goofy/ Bed, Breakfast and Bungled!
programme.desc: Goofy tries to teach Donald mindfulness in order to relax before the Roadster Games. When Clarabelle assists the Happy Helpers run a bed and breakfast, her eagerness creates more problems.

programme.desc: Everyone works together to save Goofy's favourite drive-in theater.

programme.title: Bluey: The Doctor / The Claw / Markets
programme.desc: Honey has to wait for Dr. Bingo's appointment; Bluey and Bingo fail to get candy from a claw machine; Bluey wants to buy something from the market.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Wonder-Bob/ Yay, Earth Day!
programme.desc: When Bob's lucky baseball bat breaks, the pups go on a mission to find a new one in time for the championship game. The pugs help a group of lost moles find their way back home!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Temple of the Tiger/ The Gift-Mazing Birthday
programme.desc: Freddy and Pip try their hardest to keep a baby tiger prince clean; Freddy tries to find the perfect birthday present for one of the new babies.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: One Unicorny Day!/ The Happy Horse Helpers!
programme.desc: When a horse gets a traffic cone stuck on her head and is sprayed with sparkly paint, the townsfolk think they've seen a real unicorn.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Land of the Rising Pup / ARF-CHOO
programme.desc: The pups travel to Japan to get help from the local snow monkeys and bring back snow to save Bob's ski trip.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Secret of the Pagoda/ Storm of the Ninja
programme.desc: While Catboy is too busy trying to impress An Yu, Night Ninja enters the pagoda. An Yu tries to solve an ancient riddle to become a true Mountain Master.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Open Wide and Say Aaahg
programme.desc: Timmy's tonsils are coming out and nurse Vicky is determined to make his visit unpleasant.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Farm Pit/ Crock Talk

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Best in Shoe/ Royal Pain
programme.desc: To land the lead role in a play, Alvin wagers Brittany that he can remain in character as a shoe cobbler. When Brittany becomes convinced she's a long lost princess she carries her new royal status a little too far.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Summer Camp/ Blabber Mouth
programme.desc: The Chipmunks help an owner fix up his run-down summer camp and his broken relationship with his brother. Alvin is convinced that Theodore has cursed him to never lie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners
programme.desc: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him a replica of the car. Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the Princess of England.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Fugitives/ Sherlock Chipmunk
programme.desc: When the boys accidently break Dave's new flat screen TV, they decide to become fugitives on the lam. Jeanette and Eleanor act as Sherlock Holmes and Watson when Theodore's teddy bear mysteriously disappears.

programme.desc: Devon discovers that Cruise has some skills that will help the Rangers in battle and pushes him to join the team.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Staycation/ Walking the Plankton
programme.desc: Patrick wants to take a vacation, but can't afford one, so SpongeBob comes up with a solution: a staycation.

programme.desc: Sandy's air supply is destroyed; SpongeBob wants to earn his karate belt.

programme.desc: SpongeBob helps Squidward make a happiest memory for himself; SpongeBob and Sandy have to defeat an evil Jellien overlord who's replaced everyone in Bikini Bottom with clones.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick bet who can hold a 'funny face' the longest until their faces freeze that way.

programme.title: NFL 100 Greatest: Greatest Game Changers Part 1
programme.desc: NFL stars, legends and celebrities help count down the 100th to 61st greatest game changers in NFL history.

programme.desc: NFL stars, legends and celebrities help count down the 60th to 31st greatest game changers in NFL history.

programme.desc: NFL stars, legends and celebrities help count down the 30th to 11th greatest game changers in NFL history.

programme.title: NFL 100 Greatest: Greatest Game Changers Part 4
programme.desc: NFL stars, legends and celebrities help count down the ten greatest game changers in NFL history.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jerry Jones
programme.desc: Follow Jerry Jones's career from humble beginnings as a greeter in his parents' grocery store in Arkansas to his induction into the Pro Football Hall of Fame.

programme.title: A Football Life: Steve Sabol
programme.desc: A Football Life looks back at Steve Sabol's extraordinary career and the lasting legacy he left behind.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jim Brown
programme.desc: The football life of perhaps the greatest player in NFL history and his impact both on and off the field.

programme.title: A Football Life: Bill Walsh
programme.desc: Bill Walsh was labeled a genius, but he also was an insecure, tortured artist. After revolutionizing the NFL with the 'Team of the '80s', he wrote a book that has become the bible for generations of football coaches.

programme.title: NFL 360: Fritz Pollard: A Forgotten Man
programme.desc: NFL 360 pays tribute to Fritz Pollard, one of pro football's first black players and its first black head coach. Pollard integrated the fledgling NFL a century ago, winning its inaugural title before a wave of segregation cast him aside.

programme.title: Top 10: Mount Rushmores
programme.desc: They are the four pillars of an NFL team, but how do they rank other franchises' foursomes?

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Changing the Boys' Wardrobe

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Has Her Eyes Examined
programme.desc: Lucy winds up with drops in her eyes when Ricky visits an oculist.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Isn't it Romantic
programme.desc: Dorothy's old friend, Jean comes to Miami for a visit and Dorothy decides not to tell Blanche and Rose that Jean is a lesbian. Then, after spending time with Rose, Jean begins to fall for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy's Little Lady
programme.desc: Blanche's dad announces he's remarrying; Rose and Dorothy enter a song-writing contest.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Family Affair
programme.desc: A generational clash occurs when Dorothy's son Michael and Rose's daughter Bridget visit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Vacation

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Joust Between Friends
programme.desc: Laid off from work, Dorothy searches for part-time work which leads to Blanche getting her a job at the museum. Then fur flies when Dorothy is handed the job of organizing a banquet, the duty Blanche was hoping for.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love, Rose
programme.desc: Rose places an ad in the personals column and she is let down when she doesn't hear an immediate response. This leads Blanche and Dorothy to begin responding under the name Isaac Newton.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actor Dylan Neal from the Hallmark Movies and Mysteries original 'Roux the Day: A Gourmet Detective Mystery' visits. Then, actor Rob Lowe and 'Get a Clue' host Rob Belushi stop by.

programme.title: Movie: Love's Complicated
programme.desc: Leah thinks all is fine coasting in her relationship with Edward who enrolls her in a conflict-management class. She locks horns with a radio-talk show host but develops new friendships and inner strength.

programme.desc: The maid of honour is stood up by her boyfriend and befriends the groom's best man. She then has to decide to go back to her old life or pursue a new one.

programme.title: The Office: Michael's Last Dundies
programme.desc: Michael trains Deangeloe on how to take over the job of hosting the Dundie Awards.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Michael

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: An Honest Mistake
programme.desc: Derek's confidence is shaken as he faces off with Addison over what is best for their dying pregnant patient. Meanwhile, Cristina calls the abilities of a renown surgeon into question and Bailey is appalled by a recommendation letter from the chief.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Will Follow You Into the Dark
programme.desc: After learning at a deposition that more of his patients have died than survived, Derek decides to quit. While Bailey and the Chief continue to bicker over her peds fellowship, Izzie's interns discover something unsettling about Patient X.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Stand by Me
programme.desc: After his fellow surgeons try and fail to bring Derek back to work, it falls to Meredith to convince Derek to return to Seattle Grace. Meanwhile, Mark attempts a difficult facial transplant and Cristina gets her first solo surgery.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Elevator Love Letter
programme.desc: All eyes are on Derek as he is set to perform his first surgery after his breakdown. Meanwhile, Izzie's medical condition requires her to undergo a difficult surgery and Owen has another PTSD episode that injures Cristina and traumatizes them both.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Sweet Surrender
programme.desc: As she endures aggressive treatment for her cancer, Izzie throws herself into planning Derek and Meredith's wedding. Callie introduces Arizona as her girlfriend to her disapproving father and George excels in a trauma emergency when Alex freezes.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: No Good at Saying Sorry (One More Chance)
programme.desc: As preparations continue for Meredith and Derek's wedding, Izzie's mother makes a less-than-welcome surprise visit. Meanwhile a sober Thatcher tries to make amends to Meredith and Lexi, and the Chief and Meredith fight over a controversial medical case.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: What a Difference a Day Makes
programme.desc: As Meredith, Derek and all of their friends prepare for the big wedding, a group of college students are admitted after being injured in a car crash on their way to their graduation ceremony. Meanwhile, Izzie fears the worst.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Here's to Future Days/ Now or Never

programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Kentucky Fried Finish

programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: Newcomers from Virginia talk a big game until they run out of cars after only a few races, leaving Molly and Ole Heavy without a race until they can return.

programme.desc: The Monkeys begin work on a 2018 Jeep Wrangler, the second of two jeeps they're customizing for the Gary Sinese Foundation's Veteran's Day auction. Meanwhile, Richard makes a deal on a '55 Crown Vic he hopes to donate to the Gas Monkey Foundation.

programme.desc: While the 256 team works to build a Vega from stock, Brant has taken his new Camaro to his own shop. With a big race coming up involving the whole team, Eric and Brant must find a way to bring the team back together.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Ship of Iron, Men of Steel
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the opilio season, the fleet prepares to make the final push to wrap up their seasons. Captains battle weather, equipment and their own men in a sprint to the finish, but nothing comes easy.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Man Overboard
programme.desc: After enduring months of mechanical breakdowns, sleepless grinds and infighting, the fleet is starting to crack. When the Wizard crew can't lasso a floating walrus carcass, Freddy Maugatai takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Alaskan Monster Hunt: The Lost Footage
programme.desc: Deadliest Catch captains Johnathan and Andy Hillstrand begin an adventure in their hometown of Homer, Alaska and go by air, land and sea to search for answers to the Bering Sea Monster mystery and hunt for the legendary Cadborosaurus.

programme.title: Alaskan Monster Hunt: The Lost Footage
programme.desc: Deadliest Catch captains Johnathan and Andy Hillstrand begin an adventure in their hometown of Homer, Alaska and go by air, land and sea to search for answers to the Bering Sea Monster mystery and hunt for the legendary Cadborosaurus.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Season 10 Revealed
programme.desc: The 10th season of Deadliest Catch was one for the record books. Boat fires, sunken ships, addiction and high profits proved that real life is full of surprises. With new scenes and interviews, captains and crews open up about a year they'll never forget.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Season in Hell
programme.desc: From Super Typhoon Nuri, the biggest storm to ever rock the fleet, to the grand theft of the Cape Caution, captains open up for the first time about the triumphs and betrayals of a season in hell.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legends Born and Broken
programme.desc: There are three sides to every story. For the first time captains and crews open up about the death-defying season that nearly took one of the fleet's most respected captains.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Captain vs. Captain
programme.desc: The Captains of Catch put each other on the spot with revealing questions as they face off for the first time over their failures, triumphs and most controversial moments; plus, a surprise announcement.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: Severed Ties
programme.desc: Colt and Larissa attempt to reignite their sex life. Nicole's trip hits a roadblock. Ashley decides the fate of her marriage. Chantel drops a bomb on Pedro. Elizabeth gives Andrei a wakeup call. Buried emotions get stirred up for Pao.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Who's Crying Now
programme.desc: Darcey and Tom finally meet face to face and Yolanda investigates Williams. Ed meets Rosemarie's family while Stephanie and Erika get crafty. Varya's mother questions Geoffrey and Avery and Ash take a romantic getaway.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Pillow Talk: Who's Crying Now
programme.desc: Darcey and Tom finally meet face to face and Yolanda investigates Williams. Ed meets Rosemarie's family while Stephanie and Erika get crafty. Varya's mother questions Geoffrey and Avery and Ash take a romantic getaway.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Secrets and Lies

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Spirit of the Bush
programme.desc: When the world of Browtown seems to be crumbling the Wolfpack uses their bush ingenuity not just for problem solving, but to lift morale.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Back to the Bush
programme.desc: As the Browns prepare to close down Browntown they'll need to band together so they can leave nature as they found it before searching for another settlement.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Searching for a Home
programme.desc: The Alaskan Bush is a sprawling place and the Browns will have to start charting a new path through it order to re-establish Browntown.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Tangled Trouble
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Eivin run into trouble when helping family during a haul on the Alaskan waterways. Jane and Atz Lee pass on family fishing secrets to the next generation, while Eve tames the newest member of the homestead.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Backcountry Christmas
programme.desc: As unseasonably warm conditions hit the homestead, the Kilchers venture to the backcountry for a white Christmas celebration.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Race Against Winter
programme.desc: Bear is determined to find a shipping container that is the perfect fit for his new abode on the mountain. Meanwhile, the rest of the Wolfpack build homes before winter closes in.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Wolfpack Strong
programme.desc: As the Browns work diligently on their homes, they discover a predator stalking their land. Before the big freeze, Bird enlists the help of Noah to build her Birdhouse, while Gabe is determined to build Raquell her dream log cabin.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: The 22 Hour Day
programme.desc: Spring is all about action and when there's 22 hours of daylight, the day is filled with necessary tasks to survive the coming winter.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Racing the Light
programme.desc: As sunlight rapidly diminishes, the Kilchers feel the crunch to get as much done before the winter freeze as possible.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Meet the Browns
programme.desc: The Browns are true Alaskan originals that lives off the land and often goes months at a time without seeing any outsiders.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Coupling Up
programme.desc: The Browns know a few things about communal space and they'll need to build their own one-room cabin for the entire wolf pack to live in.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Tangled Trouble
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Eivin run into trouble when helping family during a haul on the Alaskan waterways. Jane and Atz Lee pass on family fishing secrets to the next generation, while Eve tames the newest member of the homestead.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Backcountry Christmas
programme.desc: As unseasonably warm conditions hit the homestead, the Kilchers venture to the backcountry for a white Christmas celebration.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: International: Germany
programme.desc: Join Pete on an adventure in Germany with two renowned treehouse builders, Christopher Richter, a former student, and Andreas Wenning, one of the world's most celebrated treehouse architects.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Triple Decker Record Setter
programme.desc: Pete is ready to build his biggest treehouse ever in Louisiana. At over 1200 square feet, it will be more of a tree village and will include three levels and a bridge connected to a separate platform.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Treehive Beehive
programme.desc: Pete and his team take on a sticky challenge and reinvent the classic single-tree treehouse, building a breathtaking and whimsical beehive like structure soaring 30 feet high in a majestic Douglas fir.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Lost in the Forest
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with Pete's favourite and never-before-seen 'Treehouse Masters' moments. Includes hilarious crew hijinks, extra build action, and other fun footage lost on the cutting room floor.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Meditating Maple
programme.desc: Pete finds the perfect treehouse spot in West Seattle for a couple seeking a meditation space - 20 ft up in a twisting pair of maples. The NTS team channels their chakras, creating a healing space fit for both humans AND four-legged friends alike.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Treetop Candy Kitchen
programme.desc: Pete and the crew pull off a Christmas miracle, whipping up a stainless steel kitchen in the trees for a family of candy makers. At 80,000 lbs, this sweet treehouse has barrel ceilings, a loft bedroom, and a shower to wash off any sticky sugar residue.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Twin Fix
programme.desc: Pete returns to two of his builds to reconstruct, revamp and revitalize a pair of treehouses in need of major makeovers. These fixes prove to be more than just a remodel job when Pete and his team give the houses new life in the trees.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Treehouses IV
programme.desc: Join Pete Nelson on a journey to explore ingenious treehouse designs and engineering feats of builders the world over. At the end of his adventure, Pete embarks on his very own epic treehouse engineering repair.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Rustic English Re-tree-t
programme.desc: Pete and his team embark on a quest to an idyllic farm in Waxhaw, NC with orders to craft an elegant English retreat with a hanging bed fit for a queen. But one thing might stand in the way of Pete and his holy grail of pastoral treehouse builds, goats!

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nelson Family Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete gifts his daughter Emily, and Patrick, her boyfriend and an NTS carpenter, with the ultimate housewarming gift - a treehouse of their very own - by turning a piece of Nelson family history into a Moroccan marvel nested nearly 35 feet off the ground.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Mindbending Silver Maple
programme.desc: Inspired by tales of a time long past, Pete builds a treehouse cradled by the stems of a twisty silver maple on the shore of Lake Chelan. The cedar-shingled structure has a curved turret that soars two storeys high and a deck to take in views of the lake.

programme.title: College Hill: Virgin Islands: Get to Steppin
programme.desc: The cast deals with the aftermath of the 'stiletto beat down' between Krystal and Vanessa. While they wait to find out their fates after the blow up, the cast is becomes more split than ever as a result.

programme.title: College Hill: Virgin Islands: Miami Dreams
programme.desc: Krystal and Vanessa are forced to go to anger management. The cast continues to be at odds as they deal with the exile of a cast member following the blow up.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ride Along
programme.desc: A ride along goes awry, and Burgess must decide whether to follow Voight's advice or that of a new ally.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: While undercover, Ruzek discovers his father is working for a suspected drug dealer and is forced to ask whether his dad is involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: True or False
programme.desc: The wife of an alderman is beaten to death and Voight is under pressure from First Deputy Superintendent Brennan to close the case. To elicit a confession, Upton tells a dark story about her childhood.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Trigger
programme.desc: Intelligence suspects the leader of a local mosque is behind the bombing of an Army recruitment station. After a second explosion, Voight urges Halstead to follow the facts and not let his time in the service cloud his judgement.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Black and Blue
programme.desc: While CPD tries to take down a drug kingpin, Atwater faces a tough choice between doing what's required to solve the murder of a young dealer and what's best for the community.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Descent
programme.desc: In an attempt to dig himself out of a hole and save someone close to him, Antonio crosses a line that puts the entire team at risk.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Voight and Ruzek lock horns over how to handle the aftermath of the Antonio situation. Meanwhile, a series of violent carjackings turns deadly, and Ruzek must rely on a C.I. he grew up with to help solve the case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: New Normal
programme.desc: Bad heroin is causing overdoses in Chicago, and Intelligence is a man down after Voight is suspended. Antonio takes charge but Ruzek undermines his authority.

programme.title: Movie: 22 Jump Street
programme.desc: Two police officers go undercover as students at the local college in order to take down a secret drug ring. Their partnership is challenged as the two fall into their respective niches: one in the bohemian arts scene and the other on the football team.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mypods and Boomsticks
programme.desc: Bart befriends a Muslim boy, Bashir, but Homer becomes suspicious. After insulting the family and snooping around their personal business, Homer believes the family is involved in orchestrating a terrorist plot to blow up the local mall.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Burns and the Bees
programme.desc: Lisa tries to save the endangered Springfield bee population from Mr. Burns and his new sports arena. Homer attempts to help the quickly diminishing bee population by mating the Springfield bees with Africanized bees, creating a fiasco.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Drama Queen
programme.desc: Lisa meets an equally academic and creative new friend named Juliet, and together they construct a fantasy world that takes them both a little too far from reality.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Take My Life, Please
programme.desc: When Mayor Quimby inducts Vance Connor into the Springfield Walk of Fame, Homer recounts how he ran against Vance for class president in high school and lost. A magical tomato sauce reveals what Homer's life could have been if he had won.

programme.title: The Simpsons: No Loan Again, Naturally
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge's mortgage skyrockets and they are forced to put their house up for sale, Flanders does a good deed by outbidding Mr. Burns and purchasing the property. But Homer's accusations soon cause their 'landlord' to threaten eviction.

programme.title: The Simpsons: In the Name of the Grandfather
programme.desc: The Simpson family travels to Ireland so Grandpa can have one last pint at his beloved O'Flanagan's Pub in Dunkilderry. After a few spirits, Homer and Grandpa buy the establishment from the owner and try to bring it back to life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly
programme.desc: When Bart and Milhouse pull off a prank at Springfield Elementary, Milhouse takes the fall and gets suspended from school. As punishment, Homer forces Bart to visit Grampa at his retirement home where he becomes smitten with a volunteer named Jenny.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Father Knows Worst
programme.desc: When Homer observes Bart and Lisa struggling in certain aspects of their academic and social lives at school, he becomes a proponent of 'helicopter parenting,' the process of closely monitoring a child and forcing them to succeed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Waverly Hills, 9021-D'Oh
programme.desc: When Marge learns Springfield Elementary is the worst school in the state, she and Homer rent an apartment in an upscale neighbourhood so Bart and Lisa can attend a better school. To boost Lisa's popularity, Bart tells everyone she's friends with a star.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa visit the nail salon where they engage in a spirited debate as to whether a woman can be smart, powerful and beautiful all at the same time. To prove their point, they spin four tales of famous women starring familiar Springfield faces.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Coming to Homerica
programme.desc: When Springfield receives an influx of unemployed workers from neighbouring Ogdenville, Mayor Quimby decides to close its borders and Homer sets up a border patrol group.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Whopper
programme.desc: Comic Book Guy casts Homer as the lead in 'Everyman,' a feature film based on a superhero who possesses the ability to take on the powers of every superhero in every comic he touches. Unfortunately, the studio hires a trainer to whip Homer into shape.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Solves the Gas Crisis
programme.desc: Dennis and Charlie take advantage of rising gas prices by investing in barrels of gasoline and selling them door-to-door. Dee and Frank decide to expose Bruce Mathis as a terrorist leader when he plans to donate money to a Muslim community centre.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: America's Next Top Paddy's Billboard Model Contest
programme.desc: Frank buys a billboard to advertise the bar and subjects Dennis to humiliations before letting him on it. Mac sets up a contest to find women for the billboard.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac's Banging the Waitress
programme.desc: Charlie asks his best friend, Mac, to beat up The Waitress's new boyfriend, who turns out to be Mac. Dennis tries to get Charlie to catch Mac red-handed so he can be Charlie's new best friend.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac and Charlie Die
programme.desc: Mac and Charlie are afraid that Mac's recently released convict father is coming to get them. They decide to fake their own deaths in order to get out of his revenge.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Jersey Shore Dogs

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Whole Kitten Ca-Poodle
programme.desc: A look back at some of the doc's most rambunctious canine and feline cases.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Guinness Book of Pol Records
programme.desc: Working through tough cases and intense conditions is all in a day's work at PVS.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Claws and Effect
programme.desc: Animals don’t keep a calendar, so being a vet requires being on call around the clock.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol in the Family
programme.desc: On this special episode, we get a glimpse of the special bond between people and pets.

programme.title: Alaska Fish Wars: Rush the Line
programme.desc: The four captains rush to prepare for the opening season. Will the rich get richer or will the underdog make serious inroads into their dominance.

programme.title: The Planets: Pluto: The Secret Science
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores the dwarf planet Pluto, a tiny frozen world surrounded in secrets. Using the latest science, he investigates the possibility of life in its mysterious ocean.

programme.title: The Planets: Venus: The Hell Planet
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores Venus, a hellish planet covered in active volcanoes and dense clouds. Using cutting-edge technology, he decodes the secrets beneath this volatile planet and investigates if Earth could be heading towards the same fate.

programme.title: The Planets: Mars: The Definitive Guide
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino reveals the answers to some of the greatest mysteries on the Red Planet. Using the most detailed survey of Mars ever created, he discovers the dark history of our closest neighbor.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mysteries of the Big Bang
programme.desc: New discoveries are giving astronomers critical evidence about what happened when our universe was born, and using cutting-edge tech and the latest science, they might be able to finally prove if the Big Bang is responsible for our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strangest Alien Worlds
programme.desc: Discoveries of new planets have revealed countless worlds much stranger than Earth. Some of these strange worlds don't have stars, others are made out of diamonds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life
programme.desc: We're on the verge of uncovering the how life on Earth came to be. Our origin is a hotly contested scientific debate.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strangest Alien Worlds
programme.desc: Discoveries of new planets have revealed countless worlds much stranger than Earth. Some of these strange worlds don't have stars, others are made out of diamonds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Big Bang
programme.desc: As experiments go, the Large Hadron Collider at Cern is one of the biggest. Its circular tunnel is 17 miles long, and the most expensive at a cost of six billion dollars. Presenter Brian Cox tackles the question: what exactly is it going to tell us?

programme.title: Hunt for Particle X
programme.desc: Rumors of a new major scientific discovery could change everything we think we know about the universe. When CERN's Large Hadron Collider ran at its highest energy ever, rumors emerged that scientists were on the brink of discovering a new particle.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Revenge of the Fireflies
programme.desc: NASA investigates so called space fireflies that are attacking the brains of astronauts.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Return of the Moon Bugs
programme.desc: Apollo 12 astronauts bring back something alive from the moon and NASA tracks an asteroid heading towards Earth but makes a shocking discovery: it's not an asteroid, but an object that's artificial in nature.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Evil Twin
programme.desc: After NASA's New Horizons spacecraft flies by Pluto, it encounters a strange alien world that shuts down the probe's computers, and experts investigate if this mysterious object is an alien spacecraft hiding at the edge of our solar system.

programme.title: How It's Made: Microphones, Hot Tubs, Artificial Turf, Beer Steins
programme.desc: See how microphones are made, how they manufacture hot tubs, how they create artificial turf and how beer steins are created.

programme.title: How It's Made: Grinding Wheels, Compost, Window Blinds, Milk
programme.desc: Learn about grinding wheels, compost, window blinds and milk.

programme.title: How It's Made: Foosball Tables, Marseille Soap, and Laguiole Pocket Knives
programme.desc: Find out how foosball tables, marseille soap and laguiole pocket knives are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Rawhide Lampshades; Chocolate Chip Cookies; MRI Scanners
programme.desc: A look at how rawhide lampshades, chocolate chip cookies and MRI scanners are made.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Hunt for Flight MH370
programme.desc: Since 2014, the fate of Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 has remained a mystery. It's still unclear if it crashed, and if it did, the wreckage has yet to be found.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
