programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: While You Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Wangler and his wife Kathy appear to be living the middle-class dream: two sons, financial security, and a strong faith. But on September 4th, 2006, their façade falls down around them as a cold pre-meditated execution tears their family apart.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Control, Kill, Delete
programme.desc: Matt and Niqué Leili's love story is a modern romance. They meet online, create a blended family, and appear to have it all. But on July 8, 2011, the illusion of a happy marriage is torn apart forever.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Don't Shoot!
programme.desc: In 2015 in Newaygo County, Michigan, Marty and Glenna Duram are found gunned down in their own home. At the heart of the crime is their marriage. It's a bizarre story that involves drugs, stolen money, and a pet parrot who is an eyewitness.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Betting on Murder
programme.desc: Gail and Stephen Dews have it all: a happy marriage, a beautiful house and healthy children. But a family tragedy and a gambling addiction rips their lives to shreds, proving that nothing is what it seems.

programme.title: Betrayed: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: Cindy Thompson, 27, reconnects with her high school sweetheart and gets pregnant with his child, but someone wants to snuff out the couple's happiness, and Cindy's life.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: The Blood Will Not Rest
programme.desc: A crime caught on tape shows Hasidic landlord Menachem Stark in the fight for his life. When his body is found the next day, the NYPD is on the hunt for his killers - leading them to potentially deadly secrets about the beloved Brooklyn landlord.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Girl in the Window
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford lives a quiet, country life in Arkansas with her husband Dennis and their two young kids. Their love story takes a devastating turn when they get a visit from police, unveiling a double life of crime so heinous it rips the marriage apart.

programme.title: Betrayed: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: Cindy Thompson, 27, reconnects with her high school sweetheart and gets pregnant with his child, but someone wants to snuff out the couple's happiness, and Cindy's life.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: The Blood Will Not Rest
programme.desc: A crime caught on tape shows Hasidic landlord Menachem Stark in the fight for his life. When his body is found the next day, the NYPD is on the hunt for his killers - leading them to potentially deadly secrets about the beloved Brooklyn landlord.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Two-Faced
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a San Francisco businessman is found floating in the California Aqueduct. Investigators initially suspect a family member, but without evidence, the case goes cold. It will take detectives several decades to find the real killer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Betting on Murder
programme.desc: Gail and Stephen Dews have it all: a happy marriage, a beautiful house and healthy children. But a family tragedy and a gambling addiction rips their lives to shreds, proving that nothing is what it seems.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Marathon Lover
programme.desc: Remy and Jennifer Ramsaran are living the American dream in Upstate New York. When Remy begins an affair with Jennifer's best friend he's unaware that his wife has become engrossed in a virtual affair. The only plausible outcome is a deadly one.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Kentucky Thrill Ride
programme.desc: Mike and Elizabeth Turpin are the perfect couple. But when Elizabeth meets a mysterious woman with a disturbing secret she finds herself plunged into an out of control world of casual sex, drugs, steamy lesbian affairs, and ultimately- a shocking murder.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: When an eight-year old girl is found strangled to death, a local woman is instrumental in helping detectives bring the girl's brutal killer to justice.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Deadly Accusation
programme.desc: When a Naval Officer is apparently raped and stabbed by a coworker, a mysterious VHS tape suggests the victim may have been silenced to prevent a scandal. Dogged investigation and cutting edge forensic science reveals a shocking murder plot.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Dead End Trail
programme.desc: Fear grips the students of Southern Illinois University when the violated body of senior Susan Schumake is discovered near a popular campus trail. Years of tireless investigation finally reveals a remorseless killer.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A storm rattles the night in Key Largo, Florida, as an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As daylight clears away the rain, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: American Nightmare: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Winter in Iowa gets an extra chill when Shirley Wilson's son finds her stabbed to death in her home. With no forced entry, detectives believe this grandmother of 12 knew her assailant, leaving the family wondering who has betrayed them in cold blood.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: When beautiful young mother Danielle Jennings is found strangled to death in her apartment, detectives immediately believe she knew her attacker -- until a witness comes forward with a ringer of a clue that leads them to an unthinkable monster.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: The New England chills of the New Year bite even more brutally when a mother and daughter are savagely murdered in their Woburn, MA home. With several suspects on the line, detectives take a shot in the dark in order to solve this nightmare of a mystery.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Message in Red
programme.desc: When a beloved couple is gunned down in the presence of children, a cryptic message scrawled across the home leads police to suspect the crime may be drug related. The only problem is, there's no evidence the victims had any involvement in the drug trade.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Cowboys From Hell
programme.desc: When Diana Algar and Jose Molina are found brutally murdered in rural Hollenback Township, Pennsylvania, three letters scrawled across Algar's living room wall become the central clue in a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Answering the Call
programme.desc: When a brush fire is reported in rural Winchester, TN, first responders are horrified to find the body of young Megan Sharpton at the center of the blaze.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Hellfire in the Hollow
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old mother doesn't return from night classes and her car is found burned, investigators immediately suspect foul play. However no one is prepare for the web of lies that ultimately unfold due to her disappearance.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1859 Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited by friends Scott and Melanie to renovate the 1980s kitchen addition on their 1859 farmhouse. The previous owner did his best to preserve some 19th century style, but the layout doesn't work and the features are dated.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Saving a 1717 Spring House
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin and his team take on one of their most challenging projects, a dilapidated 1717 spring house. Homeowners Barbara and Joseph want to turn the spring house into a guest house with a writing space for author Barbara.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Retro-fit for the Whole Family
programme.desc: A couple found their own slice of heaven overlooking Lake Annabessacook, only to find out it needed more work than they could provide.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Top of the Mountain
programme.desc: Lucas heads west to Bountiful, UT to build a dream backyard on the side of a mountain. Faced with many challenges, Lucas creates a Tuscan themed pool complete with a spa, the biggest linear fire wall he's ever built and a grotto with a 23,000 pound lid.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Maui, Hi
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Hawaii, where he embraces the aloha spirit and takes on a whopping three-and-a-half-pound burger.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Fargo, ND
programme.desc: Casey’s eating adventure takes him to Fargo, North Dakota for a hearty European take on a cheesy classic, a breakfast-dessert mash up, and the Boiler Room’s Hot Dish Challenge – a massive Midwestern meal made for the entire family…or just one man.

programme.title: Good Eats: Down and Out in Paradise
programme.desc: A freak fishing accident leaves chef Alton Brown all washed up on a deserted tropical island. Armed with little more than a pocket knife and a will to survive, Alton gets by on coconuts, pineapples, mangos, papayas and one very feisty pig.

programme.title: Good Eats: Immersion Therapy
programme.desc: The last decade has seen a lot of change in the food world, but no device has made more of a difference than the immersion circulator. Alton Brown makes an argument for having one in every kitchen by featuring dishes such as a perfect rump roast.

programme.title: Good Eats: Dis-Kabob-Ulated
programme.desc: Alton demystifies the kabob with spicy beef kabobs and vanilla lime pineapple skewers.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Caution: Kids at Work! / The Snoozy Doozy Pet and Breakfast!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic

Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Vampirina: Going Batty/ Scare B and B
programme.desc: Vampirina, aka 'Vee,' is nervous about making new friends after she and her family move from Transylvania to Pennsylvania. The Hauntley's open up a Scare B&B and accidentally book two groups for the same night.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mixed-Up for a Day!/ Princess Clarabelle!
programme.desc: A special winner gets mixed-up for the day! When Clarabelle ends up with the hidden royal scepter, everyone in Royalandia thinks she's the new princess!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Luck Charm/ Teed Off!
programme.desc: When Goofy credits his recent good luck to his Rubber Duck, Daisy decides borrow it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Take Your Dog to Work Day / Slumber Paw-ty
programme.desc: The pups lose an important part of Bob's presentation during Take Your Dog to Work Day. Bob, the pugs and Keia run out of popcorn at their first slumber party.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Meet An Yu
programme.desc: Night Ninja heads to Mystery Mountain to unleash the mountain's magic. The PJ Masks team up with Dragon Girl to stop him.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Romeo's Melody/PJ Robot Takes Control
programme.desc: The PJ Masks must wear ear-protecting helmets when Romeo writes a song that turns listeners into his servant. PJ Robot tries to turn Romeo's Flying Factory into a Flying Party!

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Bunsen Knows All/ Doctor Fozzie
programme.desc: Bunsen is asked a question he doesn't know the answer to so he fibs and the lie grows out of control! While playing pretend hospital, Doctor Fozzie quickly gets too many patients.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Summer, the Great/ Planet Gonzo
programme.desc: Gonzo the Great decides to teach Summer how to perform daring feats of daring! The Muppet Babies hop in a rocket ship and travel to Planet Gonzo where everyone looks just like him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Light for the Lighthouse / Music City Mishap
programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Adopt-a-Palooza/ The Legend of Captain Wunderbark
programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moon Madness
programme.desc: Luna Girl steals the moon crystal to power up her Luna Fortress’ Mega-Magnet, which creates a portal that pulls stuff up from the city. The PJ Masks go off to the moon to stop her!

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Comet / Glowy Moths
programme.desc: PJ Robot persuades the PJ Masks to journey towards a comet. He thinks it’ll give HQ extra power. Luna’s teasing Romeo with her newly super-charged moths and the PJ Masks have to stop her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Dinner Thief on the Puppytown Express / O' Brother, Where ARF Thou?
programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Bee Story
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Minnie's friend, Buzzby the Bee, find her way back home after a strong wind blows her away from her sunflower in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sea Captain Mickey
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake’s sonar-detecting machine discovers that there’s something big at the bottom of Mickey Lake, Mickey and the gang hop into the Clubhouse Submarine and set out to find the 'Big Something'.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Summer Penguin, P.I./ You Ought to Be in Pictures
programme.desc: Summer assumes the role of detective when a heated game of checkers turns unpleasant. While on a field trip to a local art museum, Fozzie's lunchbox is stolen by a mischievous monkey and the Muppet Babies must chase him through paintings to get it back.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Starship Piggy/ My Buddy
programme.desc: Piggy takes credit for the spaceship Kermit made and takes the Muppet Babies to outer space. Animal lets Fozzie borrow his stuffed bunny, Buddy.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Wild Tire/ Sittin' Kitty
programme.desc: Mickey tries to surprise racing champion Jiminy Johnson with a tire from his first roadster. Minnie and Daisy wind up on a search throughout Hot Dog Hills when the cat they are pet-sitting escapes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Carnival
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends put on a fun carnival.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: In the Ocean
programme.desc: Disney music shorts to help children prepare for preschool.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Bee Story
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Minnie's friend, Buzzby the Bee, find her way back home after a strong wind blows her away from her sunflower in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Aye, Aye Captain Mickey
programme.desc: Mickey and the Clubhouse pals board Professor Von Drake's new submarine for an underwater adventure.

programme.title: Movie: Mickey's Great Clubhouse Hunt
programme.desc: Mickey is on the hunt for his clubhouse, because it has suddenly blown away in the wind.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Racing Rivals/ The Hapless Helpers

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Billy Beagle's Tip-Top Garage/ Diner Dog Rescue
programme.desc: Billy Beagle films the garage crew as they try to turn a junker into a winning roadster in one day. The Happy Helpers help a TV chef rescue the Hot Dog Diner.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Pluto and the Pup / Trouble at Floochi's!
programme.desc: Pluto becomes upset with a stowaway pup Mickey unknowingly brings to the garage. The Happy Helpers help when a pair of diamond shoes are swapped at the shoe store for another pair!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Biggest Heist Ever/ Thrillin' Hilda!
programme.desc: After Von Drake invents a truck to carry all the Roadsters, Commander Heist steals it. Hilda asks the Happy Helpers to help her find a new sport to play.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: The Big Cheesy / Shenannygans!

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Avalanche!
programme.desc: Chase heads to the Arctic to retrieve rare minerals that Davenport needs for an invention, but finds himself trapped in an avalanche.

programme.title: Lab Rats: No Going Back
programme.desc: The Lab Rats run away after they expose their bionic secret to Principal Perry.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Sink or Swim

programme.title: Movie: Bottled With Love

programme.title: Movie: The Convenient Groom

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Isn't it Romantic

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy's Little Lady

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Family Affair
programme.desc: A generational clash occurs when Dorothy's son Michael and Rose's daughter Bridget visit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Vacation
programme.desc: The girls' dream vacation in the Caribbean turns out to be far from what was advertised in the brochure. While the girls are away, Sophia romances the gardener.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Joust Between Friends
programme.desc: Laid off from work, Dorothy searches for part-time work which leads to Blanche getting her a job at the museum. Then fur flies when Dorothy is handed the job of organizing a banquet, the duty Blanche was hoping for.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love, Rose
programme.desc: Rose places an ad in the personals column and she is let down when she doesn't hear an immediate response. This leads Blanche and Dorothy to begin responding under the name Isaac Newton.

programme.title: Frasier: Liar, Liar
programme.desc: Martin is appalled when Frasier admits he pulled a prank in prep school and blamed it on a bully, who was expelled because of the incident. Out of guilt, Frasier tracks the man down and visits him in prison, but has trouble confessing the truth.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Days of the Condo
programme.desc: When his request to install a doorknocker is denied, Frasier challenges the condo association president, Ms. Langer, by running against her in the election.

programme.title: Frasier: Death and the Dog
programme.desc: When Eddie becomes lethargic and refuses to eat, Martin tries everything to perk him up. He hires a dog psychiatrist to determine the cause of this depression.

programme.title: Frasier: Four for the Seesaw
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier's spontaneous gesture of sharing a table with two beautiful women leads them to a double date at a country cabin. Frasier then tries to help Niles overcome the feeling that he's betraying Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: Niles' new apartment building doesn't allow cats or dogs, so Niles get a new cockatoo. However, his decision to throw a party to meet his new neighbours is ruined when the bird attaches itself to Niles' head.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Krantz and Gouldenstein Are Dead
programme.desc: Roz develops a reputation as the 'angel of death' after everyone she takes care of at a retirement home dies on her. Meanwhile, Frasier ponders what effect his talk show has on people.

programme.title: Frasier: The Unnatural
programme.desc: Upon learning that the radio station's softball team is short one player, Frasier's son, Frederick, insists his dad should fill in. Not wanting to let his son down, Frasier asks Martin to help him learn how to play.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Turn
programme.desc: When Roz decides to audition for her own radio show, Frasier mistakenly tells his agent, Bebe, that he would be sad to see Roz go. Frasier is outraged when Bebe tells the station manager that Frasier would quit if Roz got her own show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky's Old Girlfriend
programme.desc: A fictitious old flame of Ricky's provides a nightmare for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Million-Dollar Idea
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel have visions of making a million dollars selling salad dressing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky Minds the Baby
programme.desc: Ricky is supposed to be baby-sitting Little Ricky but somehow he's not.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Charm School
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enrol in charm school to cope with their husband's interest in a woman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 'Twas the Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: The girls each plan to spend Christmas with their families but a series of strange occurrences lead them to spend Christmas together in Miami.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Sisters
programme.desc: As a birthday present for Sophia, Dorothy brings Sophia's sister over from Sicily.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Stan Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Dorothy feels sympathy for Stan when he tells her he's going to have open heart surgery. However that sympathy fades when she learns of his many infidelities while they were married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Actor
programme.desc: The girls vie for the attention of a famous TV actor when he stars in a local play.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells

programme.title: Movie: From Friend to Fiancé

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Gossip

programme.desc: As David stresses out over the rain on his wedding day, the family scrambles to make it right.

programme.desc: Dwight tries to help the office's efficiency by installing a Doomsday device that will get them all fired if they make too many mistakes.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bear Meets Girl
programme.desc: When an ostrich lays its first egg, the Brown siblings rush to figure out how to incubate it. Bear gets a special visit from a girl on North Star Ranch as the family prepares for a surprise celebration for Billy and Ami's 40th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Nurse Todd
programme.desc: Todd is hurt when he offers help to all his kids but no one needs it, until Savannah is hit with appendicitis.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: College Bootcamp
programme.desc: When Chase pays a stranger to change his flat tire, Todd and Julie realize that they have sheltered their kids, and only have a few months left to teach them the basics of life.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Savannah has a new boyfriend, who she's intentionally keeping away from meeting her nosy family, Todd goes to extreme lengths to try to get a glimpse of this new guy, and doesn't like what he sees.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mid-life Chrisley
programme.desc: With Todd's birthday fast approaching, he begins to obsess about his age and reject getting older, but with the help of Mama Faye and her friends, he begins to accept the future.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Julie is excited to start her new food blog but when no one 'likes' her page, she and Todd go on a food journey, which takes them from fine French cuisine to foraging for their own food.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dude Ranch
programme.desc: Grayson decides he wants to be a real city slicker for his 9th birthday, and persuades his entire family to stay overnight at a working dude ranch, where they will test how country the Chrisleys really are.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys Take London
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah are ecstatic to embark on a family graduation trip to London, much to the chagrin of Todd, a creature of habit who's never left the country.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord Chrisley
programme.desc: When Todd takes his family to the English countryside, he insists on turning the Chrisleys into a proper English family but when the family resists, Todd goes to great lengths to prove he's a royal.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Love and Marriage
programme.desc: When Todd and Julie prepare to make a 'day in the life' anniversary video, the cracks in their marriage begin to show and they scramble to reinvent themselves as the 'perfect' couple.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Sports Day
programme.desc: Every summer the Chrisleys attend a family friend's annual sports day BBQ, and every year they are put to shame. Determined to break their losing streak, Todd's competitive spirit pushes his family to their breaking points.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to their South Carolina lake house, which also happens to be in the town where Todd grew up. Todd decides the kids are in need of a family history lesson, but the kids end up turning it around on him.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Graduates
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah have just graduated high school, and a celebration is in the works. As spirits run high, Todd plans on surprising Savannah by inviting her boyfriend Blaire. She has decided to take a break from him, however, threatening Todd's plans.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Achievements
programme.desc: Disappointed that he missed Savannah being crowned Miss Tennessee Teen USA, Todd plans a party to celebrate. Later, tension builds when it becomes clear the party is more for Todd than Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Wrath of Todd
programme.desc: When Chase asserts his independence by getting a tattoo of a Bible verse, Todd tries everything in his power to entice Chase to remove it. Meanwhile, Savannah is failing her college Bible class.

programme.desc: Kris forces her family to go on a vacation in Breckenridge to mend their recent arguments, but their fighting only seems to escalate.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Just Me and the Girls
programme.desc: The guys are away and so it's 24 hours of just Ree Drummond and the girls. She's whipping up a blueberry crumb cake for breakfast while they play with the new puppies. For dinner its petite filets with wasabi cilantro cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything!
programme.desc: It's question time on the ranch and Ree is covering topics ranging from recipes and romance to fashion. Dishes include three meat, three bean, three chili chili and shrimp mango lettuce cups.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Feeding 101
programme.desc: Ree cooks up three comforting make-ahead meals, including chicken cordon bleu casserole, and tex-mex tamale pie with a spicy beef filling.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: A Tale of Four Lunches
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's whipping up four legendary lunches, from crowd pleasers to solo pleasures. There's spicy chuck burgers piled high with onion rings, plus a mother-daughter lunchtime collaboration of sesame tofu salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: Cookout
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is answering cookout questions from friends and Pawhuska locals. She shares a chicken fajita salad and cilantro lime dressing arranged on a board as a stunning centerpiece.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fire and Feast
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks a spring feast while Ladd and the cowboys are busy on the ranch. She makes perfect pork tenderloin with a delicious herby mustard cream, mac and cheese primavera, and the perfect side, roasted spring veggies and dip.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Freezer!
programme.desc: Ree is stocking the freezer with breakfast, lunch, dinner and dessert. To start, there are crunchy French toast sticks followed by Tex Mex butternut squash soup for lunch and casserole royalty with king ranch chicken. For dessert are confetti cups.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Everything From Scratch
programme.desc: Making an entire meal from scratch is a challenge- now imagine doing it in only 30 minutes! Four chefs who specialize in scratch cooking take on two grueling rounds, making everything from the bottom up.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Bacon Masters
programme.desc: The bacon masters are back at it again when Guy Fieri welcomes four of the best bacon chefs to Flavortown Market for a real test of hog love. First, Guy has them make their best bacon sandwich after shopping in little, piggy-themed carts.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Wicked Aisle Games
programme.desc: A flip of a coin determines whether the chefs can shop the odd or even aisles while making their sandwich and side. In the final round the chefs must make their steakhouse dinner using one ingredient per aisle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Resolution Royale
programme.desc: Four chefs arrive in Flavortown ready to prove that traditionally unhealthy dishes can be made healthier and even more delicious.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Home Tree Home

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Party Pad

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Texas-Sized Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew saddle up and ride on down to Leakey, TX, to build a colossal, Texas-sized treehouse. He rounds-up 'the magnificent seven' of cypresses alongside the banks of the Frio River and builds a treehouse with the longest bridge in NT&S history.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: To Catch a Monitor
programme.desc: Coyote and his crew venture through the Outback in search of two iconic monitor species. As he swims through the watery oasis, he strategically stalks the Marten’s water monitor in hopes of having a face-to-face encounter.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Dragons of the North
programme.desc: Coyote and his crew venture to Australia's northern territory to investigate the saltwater and freshwater crocodiles. While there, they reveal the difference between them, and hope to bring awareness to each species.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Phantom of the Outback
programme.desc: Coyote races to Australia in search of the Perentie monitor. After a grueling week, the team makes one final attempt to capture the lizard and builds a makeshift birds nest filled with fresh eggs, in hopes of capturing the Phantom of the Outback.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Branched Out: Hot Tub Hideaway
programme.desc: The NTS crew heads to Washington to build their first hot tub in the woods that features a wine bar. Then, Pete is tasks to design the ultimate treehouse B&B that includes amenities like a wraparound deck and waterfall views.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: To Catch a Monitor

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sunrise Day Camp Clubhouse
programme.desc: Pete constructs an amazing clubhouse for Sunrise Day Camp: a summer camp for kids battling cancer. This open-air treehouse grants campers full interaction with nature by erasing the line between indoors and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: View From Above III
programme.desc: Pete and his crew gather 'round the campfire to answer questions from fans, and recall the most magnificent builds, heartwarming memories, and downright ridiculous moments they've enjoyed in the world of treehouses.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Bon-Appé-Treehouse

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Takeover: The Roderick Experience
programme.desc: Pete passes the torch to Roderick to tackle a build on land with six generations of history. A whimsical staircase wrapped in branches leads up to a hexagonal tower with colorful stained glass windows, and a platform that boasts 360 degree views.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Surprise Makeover Edition
programme.desc: In this special season finale, Pete surprises two lucky winners to receive complete, top-to-bottom, $20,000 renovations of their existing treehouse.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Treehouse 'Z'
programme.desc: Pete connects with old friends in Canton, NC to build them a Zen-like sanctuary in the trees. Battling a record-fast 9-day build window, the team stays calm in constructing a retreat 15-ft high with a picture perfect view of the Blue Ridge Mountains.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Chase on the Border
programme.desc: When the Texas Game Wardens encounter a sick bald eagle, it becomes a race against time to ensure its survival.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poachers and Liars

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poaching Rampage
programme.desc: Game Wardens investigate an illegal deer hunting case that becomes the largest deer poaching case in Texas history.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back in the Wild
programme.desc: Anglers are out all over Texas. In Houston County, a Game Warden returns after a life-threatening injury. Along the coast, fishermen get caught with too many sharks. A protected turtle gets relocated and anglers on the Gulf learn how to tag fish.

programme.title: Jessie: Someone Has Tou-pay
programme.desc: Bertram bought a new toupee for his band's big performance, but when it goes missing, Jessie interrogates each of the kids in hopes of finding it.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Keepin' it Real

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: As Bad As She Gets

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have Potato Pants?

programme.desc: Joey and Parker’s room is so filthy that they try to get the girls to clean it for them. After losing a bet, the girls spend the night in the boys’ room and Liv regrets blaming her sister for losing after Maddie goes missing in Parker's tunnels.

programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.desc: While CPD tries to take down a drug kingpin, Atwater faces a tough choice between doing what's required to solve the murder of a young dealer and what's best for the community.

programme.desc: In an attempt to dig himself out of a hole and save someone close to him, Antonio crosses a line that puts the entire team at risk.

programme.title: Snapped: Caren Pressley-Brown

programme.title: Snapped: Exondia Salado

programme.desc: Kay Mortensen took pride in preparing for every possible threat, so when he was found dead at home, those who knew him were stunned. The brutal killing put two of Kay's loved ones behind bars and in danger.

programme.title: Movie: Interstellar

programme.desc: When Mrs. Krabappel confiscates the students' cellphones, Bart leads an organized effort to stop her by spiking her coffee and watching her make a drunken fool of herself. Principal Skinner fires her and replaces her with a cool new teacher.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Wife Hope
programme.desc: The men and boys of Springfield become obsessed with Mixed Martial Arts, a sport where fighters inflict severe pain on one another. When Marge and her friends stage a protest, the show's promoter embraces the controversy and challenges Marge to a match.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pranks and Greens

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rednecks and Broomsticks

programme.desc: On this special episode of The Incredible Dr. Pol, it’s all about furry felines.

programme.desc: On this special episode of The Incredible Dr. Pol, it’s all about perfect pooches.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Treasure of Solomon
programme.desc: The High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem could have hidden their most sacred items before the city was sacked by the Romans and the Dead Sea Scrolls could actually be a treasure map to these hidden wonders. See what else lies under this ancient city.

programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Danger: Death Jump
programme.desc: Todd Sampson takes a deadly leap of faith. In a dangerous bungee jump, his life depends on the strength of two phone books whose individual pages are weaved together that tether Todd to the bungee cord.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Psych: Very Important Sheeple
programme.desc: Discover the hilarious psychology behind pranks and practical jokes. Find out what happens when people are scared into fight or flight, offered unusual VIP services and more.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Psych: Flash Mob Freak-Out
programme.desc: Find out how people react when a stranger pops a kid's balloon or pops them the question.

programme.title: Street Science: Superpowered Glue
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts reveal the magic of one of the strongest glues on earth. They find out if just a few drops can keep a bungee jumper safe, and if it can lift thousands of pounds.

programme.title: Street Science: Car Chaos
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts use cutting-edge experiments to investigate the hidden dangers of a car crash, and if everyday objects can stop an arrow fired from a high-powered crossbow.

programme.title: Street Science: Dead Drop Danger
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts test the laws of gravity in a series of wild, Galileo-inspired experiments.

programme.title: Street Science: Hollywood Explosions
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts investigate the explosive power of gasoline. Using cutting-edge science experiments, they find if a tank of gas really explodes like it does in the movies and what it takes to make a Hollywood-style fireball.

programme.title: Mega Shippers: Billion-Dollar Superbuild
programme.desc: A nearly $2-billion bridge is being built, and mega shippers need to lift massive sections of the bridge 180 feet above a dangerous river. In Florida, $150 million-worth of yachts need to be moved without a scratch.

programme.title: Mega Shippers: Grand Ship Auto
programme.desc: Shipping from England to Baltimore, $34 million-worth of vehicles are to waiting to be moved across the Atlantic, but their ride is running late. In New Jersey, a multimillion-dollar convoy of nuclear reactor parts presents unique challenges to the crew.

programme.title: Mega Shippers: Championship Cargo
programme.desc: A brand new $33 million helicopter has just come off the production line. But getting it across the Atlantic in pristine condition is no small feat. Meanwhile, a championship rally car needs to be moved across five countries and two seas in just 76 hours.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Coal Mine
programme.desc: A rusting industrial complex deep in the woods was once a cornerstone of American business empire, but today, it sits deserted; experts reveal the secrets of this prosperous town's ruin.

programme.title: Titanic: Conspiracy of Failure
programme.desc: New evidence is revealing fresh twists to the fatal chain-of-events that caused the Titanic to sink, and using cutting-edge technology and the latest scientific methods, experts investigate the secret history of its infamous sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal the Nazis got closer to America than ever believed, and using the latest cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.desc: It's a full moon in New Orleans, and sure enough, all night long, the calls for the EMTs seem to get crazier and crazier. There's a machete hacking, a man whose finger is bitten off by a dog and a guy stabbed by a man dating his ex-wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch: United We Stand
programme.desc: On the fourth of July in New Orleans, the heat seems to trigger havoc in the streets. Holly, Nick and Keeley arrive at a bloody scene where a woman could lose her arm after a bar fight. Then, a first responder is assaulted at the scene of an accident.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: Two innocent teenage girls are targeted by obsessed stalkers. One manages to survive, and after police raid her stalker's home, he's sent to prison. The other had no idea she had a stalker until he killed her, then himself.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A man takes cyber-stalking to a whole new level by sending hundreds of threatening messages and posting over 40 videos on social media that document his twisted fixation for a former high school classmate.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A woman scared to death by a stalker is relieved when he disappears for a few years--only to make a terrifying return.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: World famous prosecutor, Marcia Clark, investigates the bone chilling, unresolved death of toddler Caylee Anthony to see if the beautiful little girl was murdered by her own mother.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed Miss Brown Sugar
programme.desc: When 21-year-old Erica Vassell disappears after a Super Bowl party in Clewiston, Florida, the town launches an immediate search. But when her brutally murdered body is discovered days later, everyone in the tiny glades town is left in shock and fear.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: No Witnesses
programme.desc: When two young ladies don't return home after a run to the local drive-thru, their concerned parents immediately set out on a search to find them. However it will be a fisherman that will give police their first clue that something evil has happened.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When the sleepy town of Mooresburg, TN receives news that beloved teacher Margaret Jack Sliger is murdered on her farm, Hawkins County detectives are charged with finding the sinister perpetrator to bring their community justice.

programme.title: American Monster: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: US Air Force sergeant Nathan Paet and his family appear to live a blissfully normal life - as these never-before-aired home videos attest. But blind greed would bring about the destruction of this loving family.

programme.title: Diabolical: Sins of a Mother
programme.desc: In 1994, Lake Orion, Michigan is rocked by a vicious murder. At first, the crime is a mystery. But in a small town where everyone knows each other, rumors start flying. Soon, police expose a strange and twisted plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Game Over
programme.desc: In 1994, high school coach Mike Bernos was found dead in a recliner, his body riddled with 15 bullets. His adopted son, Daniel Blan, was convicted of the murder. Now Daniel's wife and childhood friend are fighting for his freedom.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Prominent business people John and Liz Calvert, vanish in 2008 from upscale paradise Hilton Head, SC. Friends, sheriff's investigators and local reporters recall the shock and disbelief the couple disappeared without a trace from a place so peaceful.

programme.title: Diabolical: Sins of a Mother
programme.desc: In 1994, Lake Orion, Michigan is rocked by a vicious murder. At first, the crime is a mystery. But in a small town where everyone knows each other, rumors start flying. Soon, police expose a strange and twisted plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Game Over
programme.desc: In 1994, high school coach Mike Bernos was found dead in a recliner, his body riddled with 15 bullets. His adopted son, Daniel Blan, was convicted of the murder. Now Daniel's wife and childhood friend are fighting for his freedom.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Darkness Before Don
programme.desc: The Blue Ridge Mountains of North Carolina make a perfect backdrop--for murder. Pillars of the community are pulled into a nightmare when affairs, abuse and embezzlement lead to someone losing their head.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Fatal Fuse
programme.desc: Police find a homeowner dead in their driveway riddled with bullets. Although one of the victim's family members claims to have witnessed the brutal attack, the alleged chain of events raises more questions than answers.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: This is Not a Drill
programme.desc: It was an ordinary day at Chardon High School in Ohio, full of the fights, laughs and boisterous behaviour that fill the corridors of any high school. But all that changes when one young man shows up with violence on his mind.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Hearts on Fire
programme.desc: Billy Frietag is a free-spirited young man who spends the warmer months working the family fruit and vegetable farm, and travels when it's cold. Tragically, it's his openness and generosity that lead to strange set of events which culminate in his death.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: I Speak For Amy
programme.desc: College athlete Kayleigh Ballantyne is returning home one night when she is violently attacked. As she battles for her life, she is unaware that elsewhere in the city an investigation is already underway following the discovery of a young woman's body.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: My Lacie
programme.desc: Charisse Christopher escapes her abusive husband and sets up a new, safe home with her three-year-old son Nicholas and her baby Lacie. Several months later, the police discover a scene of slaughter which isn't quite what it seems.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Dragged to Hell
programme.desc: Amanda Storms watches her high school sweetheart transform from great stepdad to abusive husband. When he moves out, she's grateful for the help of her friend Andrew Shepherd - until a terrible night of violence changes everything.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Any Other Day
programme.desc: When Shirlee Sherman and Thomas Hunter are found stabbed to death in an upscale home in Omaha, Nebraska, suspects and clues are in short supply. It will take Detectives five years to zero on a perpetrator, but not before he kills again.

programme.title: See No Evil: Watching Amy Lord
programme.desc: 24-year-old former cheerleader Amy Lord is missing in South Boston. Police first find her burned car and then... her body. Incredible footage from five ATMs and outside her apartment building captures the exact moment she was taken by her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Silent Witness
programme.desc: A husband and respected businessman vanishes after a meeting. Meanwhile a young mother doesn't come back from her job search. Cops can only rely on one witness-one that never lies-surveillance cameras.

programme.title: See No Evil: Must Find Mickey
programme.desc: 21-year-old Mickey Shunick is missing after a night out. Her family is terrified and mobilizes the local community to help search for her. Police are unable to find any trace of the Louisiana student -- until they spot her on surveillance video...

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Babysitter
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her off at home. Her distraught mother Virginia says she never walked through the door. Police are baffled until they uncover a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder by Design
programme.desc: Investigators are looking into the killing spree that ended the life of Gianni Versace in Miami 20 years ago.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: America's Code Breakers
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. But with uncrackable encryption available for your cell phone and computer, have U.S. code warriors finally met their match?

programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway

programme.title: Restored: Restoring a Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Restoration expert Brett Waterman is hired to restore a 1913 Arts and Crafts bungalow. This 100 year-old home has experienced incomplete renovations and numerous bad choices over the years. Brett rediscovers the home's history and architectural features.

programme.title: Restored: The 1955 Mid-century California Ranch
programme.desc: Brett opens up the floor plan of a 1950s mid-century ranch and makes the space more livable for a family of four while staying true to the original style.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s California Ranch Project
programme.desc: Brett is horrified when a local fire chief and his wife ask him to completely gut and restore their 1940s California Ranch. Brett sets out to show them they can have a kitchen with all the modern conveniences they desire.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Restored: The 1955 Mid-century California Ranch
programme.desc: Brett opens up the floor plan of a 1950s mid-century ranch and makes the space more livable for a family of four while staying true to the original style.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rescuing a Massive Barn, Finishing the Lincoln Cabin
programme.desc: The guys rescue a huge double-pen barn in St. Meinrad, Indiana. It's the biggest dogtrot-style barn they've ever faced. They have to fight through modern layers of tin and barnwood to get to the incredible, pioneer-era handhewn beams.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bird's-Eye Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a massive double-pen barn in southern Indiana. While they work to save every log and barn board, Mark visits an incredible lodge built from a different barn they took down in nearby St. Meinrad.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Repurposing Every Beam From a Pennsylvania Bank Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a Pennsylvania Bank Barn in hopes of recovering the Long Beams and Huge Sleeper Logs that lay below. They are up against the weather, the machines malfunctioning and the weight of the logs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fighting the Elements to Build a Well House, and Repairing a Damaged Log Home
programme.desc: Mark and the guys return to their roots in Asheville, North Carolina. They have one day to build a log well house in the driving rain. Once it's up, they have to repair a severely damaged log home nearby.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Coast to Coast Cookouts
programme.desc: Seattle chef Renee Erickson celebrates summer by smoking food in wine barrels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Feast
programme.desc: Chef Jason French prepares his food in a wood-fired oven and an outdoor smoker.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Seafood Feast
programme.desc: Brothers Vaughn and Gary Knowles take Roger to the docks for fresh lobsters and clams for a breathtaking seafood feast. The Nisqually Tribe teaches Roger ways of preparing seafood.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Outrageous Ovens
programme.desc: Mark Skudlarek fires his kiln to bake pottery and uses some of the coals for cooking.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Feasts Over Fire in Hawaii
programme.desc: Roger's first visit to the 50th state promises big fires and big feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: South Carolina Surf and Turf
programme.desc: Roger leaves the city of Charleston and heads out into the country for some whole hog barbecue and low-country oyster roasts.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
