programme.title: Friends: The One With Phoebe's Ex-Partner
programme.desc: Phoebe is reunited with her former singing partner; Ross is jealous of Rachel's friend.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Cigar Talk
programme.desc: When Joyce invites Vince to attend her high school reunion, Vince confesses that he never graduated. Vince then asks Mike to help him study for his GED.

programme.title: Mom: Teenage Vampires and a White Russian
programme.desc: Bonnie is upset when her brother, Ray is arrested and calls Adam instead of her to bail him out. Also, Christy gets fired from her job at the restaurant.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Kinda Like Necrophilia
programme.desc: Alan seeks revenge when he discovers that Charlie stole his high school girlfriend.

programme.title: Black-ish: Old Digger
programme.desc: Dre has never had a problem with Pops dating, but when it comes to Ruby, he won't let anyone come between them. When Ruby invites Dre and Bow to meet the new man in her life, Dre immediately goes on the defensive and finds any reason to dislike him.

programme.title: Black-ish: Colored Commentary
programme.desc: Dre wants the family to feel more connected so he encourages 'Team Johnson' to embrace what it means to have each other’s backs.

programme.title: Supergirl: Crisis on Infinite Earths: Part One
programme.desc: The Monitor sends Harbinger to gather the world's greatest heroes in preparation for the Crisis. With their worlds in danger, the superheroes suit up for battle while J'onn and Alex recruit Lena to help them find a way to save the people of Earth-38.

programme.title: Batwoman: Crisis on Infinite Earths: Part Two
programme.desc: The group uses Ray's invention to track new recruits to help save the universe. The Monitor sends Iris, Clark and Lois in search of a mysterious Kryptonian. Kate and Kara head out to find Bruce Wayne. Mia challenge Sara. Lex Luthor returns.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rosita Dies
programme.desc: Phoebe's first day as a telemarketer turns bizarre when she meets her distraught manager.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Wizard
programme.desc: When Jerry buys an expensive organizer for his father, Morty refuses to use it to its full potential.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: School Recital
programme.desc: Molly is so focused on directing a school recital that she doesn't realize a fellow teacher is hitting on her. Meanwhile, Vince convinces Mike to join him in an unusual money-making scheme.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Meander to Your Dander
programme.desc: Charlie coaches Alan in the fine art of breaking up with a woman.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Rush
programme.desc: When Beverly gives Adam a "Best Son" trophy, Barry brings to her attention that she always favours Adam. Appalled, Beverly decides to ignore Adam (much to his delight) and smother Barry (much to his dislike), but it backfires.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Dance Party USA
programme.desc: Thinking Pop's luck can rub off on him, Adam gambles at school and loses his toys as a result. Beverly replaces them but Adam knows better. He also learns something new about Pops that allows Adam to accept his grandfather for who he is.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Really Petty Cash
programme.desc: Johnny's girlfriend has a devious plan in mind when she hires Max and Caroline to bake cupcakes for an art show featuring his work.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Higher Ground
programme.desc: During an all-night reconnecting session, Melanie reveals her infertility to Tasha, who after deciding to become celibate, agrees to be the surrogate for Melanie and Derwin.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Big Brother
programme.desc: When a neighbour's security camera catches Vanessa spraying the neighbourhood cat with a hose, an upset Mike feels like they don't have any privacy, but as Mike reviews the security footage, he also sees Mandy in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackée Harry, Howie Mandel, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Dana vs. Trujillo
programme.desc: A woman finds her husband on dating sites and the sexually explicit messages he sends other women. Suspecting he’s physically cheating the court enlists former expert military interrogator to find out the truth!

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: I'm Just the Pool Boy/ Personal Trainer
programme.desc: A man claims his business was defamed; a personal trainer pushes a client too far resulting in injury.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Adding Insult to Injury/ Off 2nd Avenue
programme.desc: A woman claims she got an infection from a cosmetic procedure; an artist claims his exhibit sales suffered due to a poor location.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Wilson/ Nicola vs. Eddy
programme.desc: Lies and betrayal bring two cousins to court after one had sex with the others girlfriend. The DNA question has torn their families apart and each man hopes to prove he fathered her ten-month-old son.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Prom Disaster
programme.desc: A unique prom is cancelled at the last minute.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Fruit Punched!
programme.desc: Emily's been enjoying an online relationship with Adam but her family wants her to focus on education. Elizabeth confronts her former friend Eva who slept with her fiance. Brittany wants to know what's going on between her boyfriend Tim and cousin Kaylin.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A sister is sung her younger brother because he agreed to help with their mother’s funeral expenses, but he has failed to do so. The brother is countersuing because he claims his sister falsely accused him of stealing from her.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segment features the cases 'Distressing an Ex', ' Crashing and Dashing ' and 'A Potty Problem'.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include: Taking It Out On An Ex, Refusing A Ring Return and Hitting A Woman Where It Hurts.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Mumbai Marriage Misfortune/ Delilah Got Knocked Up
programme.desc: A man sues his daughter for skipping out on an arranged marriage. A woman sues when her show dog gets impregnated by a mutt.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman says her travel agent ruined her trip; he says she was looking for a free trip and he delivered on everything agreed upon. The, a woman says a car she bought broke down after one week.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Dad, Did You Steal From Me?
programme.desc: Crystal suspects that a missing bracelet and necklace were in fact stolen from her. Additionally, Karla and her family accuse the ex-girlfriend of their deceased brother of theft, while Tamela accuses her sister Pamela of stealing money.

programme.title: Maury: Stop Lying to Your Man ... I'll Prove He's Raising My Baby!
programme.desc: Emily needs to prove to her ex Austin that her fiancé Matt is the father of her daughter. Juan's best friend slept with his fiancée Kassandra and could be the father of her child. Delree says Angelina is a liar and a cheater and is denying her sons.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Spare Me Your Excuses
programme.desc: Daniel and his friend Melissa go bowling one night, and Daniel's girlfriend Amanda ends up in the gutter. Jessica, Josh and Libby all live together, but Jessica is trying come between Josh and Libby's relationship.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: Cyberbullying Is Ruining My Life!
programme.desc: Mel takes a deep look at cyberbullying, including a woman harassed online by her future mother-in-law and the tragic story a 16-year-old boy who was driven to suicide.

programme.title: Movie: They Came Together
programme.desc: A man's company threatens to run a woman's shop out of business, yet the two still fall in love. When things go south, the archetypal couple must overcome a series of classic hurdles in the rom-com genre before finding their way back to one another.

programme.title: Movie: Punch Drunk Love
programme.desc: A beleaguered small-business owner embarks on a romantic journey with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Movie: Greenberg
programme.desc: A 40-year-old carpenter from New York goes to Los Angeles to house sit for his brother and his family. He develops a relationship with his brother's assistant while she helps him with the house and the family dog.

programme.title: Movie: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Repressed risk analyst Reuben Feffer keeps his life planned out perfectly until his new bride leaves him on their honeymoon. When a free-spirited former classmate comes back into his life, he re-evaluates his overly ordered universe.

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty
programme.desc: Bruce, a dissatisfied reporter, finds himself endowed with God's powers. At first he is delighted with all of the things he can do, but he quickly learns how difficult it can be to run the world.

programme.title: Movie: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story
programme.desc: A gym owner is at risk of losing his business unless he can come up with $50,000. He and some of his less-than-average clientele enter a dodgeball competition in order to raise the funds and save the gym from his rival.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Muriel's Wedding
programme.desc: A socially inept young woman with a dysfunctional family yearns for a better life.

programme.title: Movie: Baby's Day Out
programme.desc: A kidnapped baby escapes from bumbling criminals into downtown Chicago.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Popper's Penguins
programme.desc: A businessman's life is drastically changed when he comes into possession of six penguins. To care for his new pets he must turn his house into a winter wonderland and change himself from the professional work obsessed man he once was.

programme.title: Movie: Big Top Pee-Wee
programme.desc: Pee-Wee Herman joins a circus troupe as they put on a really big show.

programme.title: Movie: Bedazzled
programme.desc: A dweeb is granted seven wishes by the devil to help him snare the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Hair Wolf
programme.desc: Brooklyn hair salon customers must fend off white women who feed off the lifeblood of black culture.

programme.title: Movie: Emma
programme.desc: A young woman who plays matchmaker for others is unable to recognize her own feelings.

programme.title: Movie: One Fine Day
programme.desc: Two busy single parents get to know each other over the course of a mishap-filled day.

programme.title: Movie: Big
programme.desc: A boy awakens as a full-grown man but is not ready to face the adult world.
